'''鈭歴h-g-d''' ('''shagada''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:elutriate|elutriate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-g-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:elutriate|elutriate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-g-d
|-
! Lemma
| shagada
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shagadithi|shagadithi]] || [[word:shagadiji|shagadiji]] || [[word:shagadishi|shagadishi]] || [[word:shagadi|shagadi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shagaduthuth|shagaduthuth]] || [[word:shagadujuj|shagadujuj]] || [[word:shagadushush|shagadushush]] || [[word:shagad|shagad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shagaduthu|shagaduthu]] || [[word:shagaduju|shagaduju]] || [[word:shagadushu|shagadushu]] || [[word:shagadu|shagadu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shagadufuth|shagadufuth]] || [[word:shagadufuj|shagadufuj]] || [[word:shagadufush|shagadufush]] || [[word:shagaduf|shagaduf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shagadethe|shagadethe]] || [[word:shagadeje|shagadeje]] || [[word:shagadeshe|shagadeshe]] || [[word:shagade|shagade]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shagadothoth|shagadothoth]] || [[word:shagadojoj|shagadojoj]] || [[word:shagadoshosh|shagadoshosh]] || [[word:shagad|shagad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shagadotho|shagadotho]] || [[word:shagadojo|shagadojo]] || [[word:shagadosho|shagadosho]] || [[word:shagado|shagado]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shagadofoth|shagadofoth]] || [[word:shagadofoj|shagadofoj]] || [[word:shagadofosh|shagadofosh]] || [[word:shagadof|shagadof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shagad忙th忙|shagad忙th忙]] || [[word:shagad忙j忙|shagad忙j忙]] || [[word:shagad忙sh忙|shagad忙sh忙]] || [[word:shagad忙|shagad忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shagadathath|shagadathath]] || [[word:shagadajaj|shagadajaj]] || [[word:shagadashash|shagadashash]] || [[word:shagad|shagad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shagadatha|shagadatha]] || [[word:shagadaja|shagadaja]] || [[word:shagadasha|shagadasha]] || [[word:shagada|shagada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shagadafath|shagadafath]] || [[word:shagadafaj|shagadafaj]] || [[word:shagadafash|shagadafash]] || [[word:shagadaf|shagadaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:shagadasha|shagadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagadasha|goshagadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagadasha|gokishagadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:shagadn眉sha|shagadn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagadnkn眉sha|goshagadnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagadn眉sha|gokishagadn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagadsh毛sha|shagadsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagadnksh毛sha|goshagadnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagadsh毛sha|gokishagadsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagadrosha|shagadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagadnkrosha|goshagadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagadrosha|gokishagadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagadmusha|shagadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagadnkmusha|goshagadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagadmusha|gokishagadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagadsherasha|shagadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagadnksherasha|goshagadnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagadsherasha|gokishagadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagadngasha|shagadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagadnkngasha|goshagadnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagadngasha|gokishagadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagadyasha|shagadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagadnkyasha|goshagadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagadyasha|gokishagadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagadyamasha|shagadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagadnkyamasha|goshagadnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagadyamasha|gokishagadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagadn眉sh毛sha|shagadn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagadnkn眉sh毛sha|goshagadnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagadn眉sh毛sha|gokishagadn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagadn眉rosha|shagadn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagadnkn眉rosha|goshagadnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagadn眉rosha|gokishagadn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagadn眉musha|shagadn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagadnkn眉musha|goshagadnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagadn眉musha|gokishagadn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagadsh毛n眉sha|shagadsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagadnksh毛n眉sha|goshagadnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagadsh毛n眉sha|gokishagadsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagadsh毛rosha|shagadsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagadnksh毛rosha|goshagadnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagadsh毛rosha|gokishagadsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagadsh毛musha|shagadsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagadnksh毛musha|goshagadnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagadsh毛musha|gokishagadsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagadron眉sha|shagadron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagadnkron眉sha|goshagadnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagadron眉sha|gokishagadron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagadrosh毛sha|shagadrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagadnkrosh毛sha|goshagadnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagadrosh毛sha|gokishagadrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagadromusha|shagadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagadnkromusha|goshagadnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagadromusha|gokishagadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagadmun眉sha|shagadmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagadnkmun眉sha|goshagadnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagadmun眉sha|gokishagadmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagadmush毛sha|shagadmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagadnkmush毛sha|goshagadnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagadmush毛sha|gokishagadmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagadmurosha|shagadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagadnkmurosha|goshagadnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagadmurosha|gokishagadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:shagad|shagad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:sh忙g忙d|sh忙g忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoshagad|hoshagad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hosh忙g忙d|hosh忙g忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoshagad|hohoshagad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosh忙g忙d|hohosh忙g忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉shagad|n眉shagad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉sh忙g忙d|n眉sh忙g忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉shagad|n眉n眉shagad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉sh忙g忙d|n眉n眉sh忙g忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂shagad|n茂shagad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂sh忙g忙d|n茂sh忙g忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂shagad|n茂n茂shagad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂sh忙g忙d|n茂n茂sh忙g忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lushagad|lushagad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lush忙g忙d|lush忙g忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulushagad|lulushagad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulush忙g忙d|lulush忙g忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lishagad|lishagad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lish忙g忙d|lish忙g忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilishagad|lilishagad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilish忙g忙d|lilish忙g忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koshagad|koshagad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kosh忙g忙d|kosh忙g忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoshagad|kokoshagad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosh忙g忙d|kokosh忙g忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keshagad|keshagad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kesh忙g忙d|kesh忙g忙d]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeshagad|kekeshagad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesh忙g忙d|kekesh忙g忙d]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
